title: SBERT Job Description Embeddings

title: CONFIT Hyperparameter Tuning
description: Hyperparameter optimization for bidirectional alignment model to match resumes with job descriptions, improving weak feature performance.

title: RiceLense
description: A streamlit application for classifying rice grains using images.

title: AppAI
